---
title: "Innovations"
---

My work involves developing open-source tools, cloud applications, and browser extensions to streamline geospatial workflows for researchers and data scientists.

My work involves developing open-source tools, cloud applications, and browser extensions to streamline geospatial workflows for researchers and data scientists.

::: {.innovation-section}

## 🌍 Earth Engine Apps

::: {.innovation-grid}

::: {.innovation-card}
![Spectral Curve](images/geeai.jpg)
::: {.innovation-card-label}
Spectral Reflectance Curve
:::
::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/spectral){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
![Phenology signature](images/agrimooc.jpg)
::: {.innovation-card-label}
Phenology Signature
:::
::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/signature){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
![Flood Susceptibility](https://placehold.co/400x300/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Flood+Risk)
::: {.innovation-card-label}
Flood Susceptibility
:::
::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/floodsusceptibility){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
![Odisha Flood Map](https://placehold.co/400x300/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Odisha+Flood)
::: {.innovation-card-label}
Odisha Flood Map
:::
::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/odishaflood){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

## 📦 Python Packages

::: {.innovation-grid}

::: {.innovation-card}
![geeadvance](https://placehold.co/400x300/27ae60/ffffff?text=geeadvance)
::: {.innovation-card-label}
geeadvance
:::
::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/geeadvance/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/geeadvance){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
![deepgee](https://placehold.co/400x300/34495e/ffffff?text=deepgee)
::: {.innovation-card-label}
deepgee
:::
::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/deepgee/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/deepgee){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
![geeassist](images/geeai.jpg)
::: {.innovation-card-label}
geeassist
:::
::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/geeassist/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/geeassist){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

## 📚 R Library

::: {.innovation-grid}

::: {.innovation-card}
![rpygee](https://placehold.co/400x300/2980b9/ffffff?text=rpygee)
::: {.innovation-card-label}
rpygee
:::
::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Docs](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/rpygee/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/rpygee){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

## 🛠️ Extensions & Tools

::: {.innovation-grid}

::: {.innovation-card}
![GEE AI Assistant](images/geeaibg.JPG)
::: {.innovation-card-label}
GEE AI Assistant
:::
::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-browser-chrome"></i> Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/gee-ai-assistant/kldhacnbicjpbdiebjjflnhgcmheokkl){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/gee-ai-assistant){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
![Quick Screenshot](https://placehold.co/400x300/e67e22/ffffff?text=Screenshot)
::: {.innovation-card-label}
Quick Screenshot
:::
::: {.innovation-card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-browser-chrome"></i> Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/koeblknkgkpklkpcbfigakkfnhkkadnm){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

:::


:::


:::


:::

:::

:::
